sample.className: text-brand-accent pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-0 bottom-0 h-[60vh] w-full

rules:
@layer theme {
  :host, :root { --font-mono: var(--font-geist-mono),ui-monospace,SFMono-Regular,"SF Mono",Menlo,Consolas,"Liberation Mono",monospace; --color-emerald-500: oklch(69.6% .17 162.48); --color-blue-500: oklch(62.3% .214 259.815); --color-blue-600: oklch(54.6% .245 262.881); --color-black: #000; --color-white: #fff; --spacing: .25rem; --container-xs: 20rem; --container-sm: 24rem; --conta

:root { --surface-primary: white; --surface-secondary: var(--sand-2); --overlay: var(--surface-primary); --fg-high: var(--sand-12); --fg-mid: var(--sand-11); --fg-low: var(--sand-10); --fg-inverted: white; --fg-error: var(--red-10); --fg-success: var(--green-11); --fg-warning: var(--amber-11); --fg-info: var(--blue-11); --brand-accent: oklch(var(--tangerine-9-oklch)); --bubble-accent: var(--brand-

.reveal-item { animation-duration: 1.3s; animation-timing-function: cubic-bezier(0.19, 1, 0.22, 1); animation-iteration-count: 1; animation-direction: normal; animation-fill-mode: backwards; animation-play-state: running; animation-name: reveal; animation-timeline: auto; animation-range: normal; animation-delay: calc(var(--index)*60ms); display: inline-block; }
